textPlain: Doesn't feel all that long ago when Intel pushed Nvidia out of the chipset market, and how that felt almost existential for Nvidia at the time.Tables have turned a fair bit since then.

Now we know why the Lip Bu Tan CEO of Intel declared they would stop competing with Nvidia.Hard to see the government and Nvidia buying up Intel as any sort of real solution. Intel had to compete its way back to competitiveness, not this, whatever “this” is.
